_comment: Velix commandline skill configuration — loaded from ../../config/terminal.json

approval._comment_mode: 'smart' = pattern-match dangerous cmds and ask; 'off' = always allow; 'manual' = always ask
approval._comment_timeout_sec: Seconds to wait for handler approval reply before auto-denying

execution._comment_default_timeout_sec: Default command timeout if caller does not supply timeout_sec
execution._comment_max_timeout_sec: Hard ceiling — caller cannot exceed this
execution._comment_max_output_chars: stdout/stderr each truncated to this (head 40% + tail 60%)

sandbox._comment_playground_root: Root directory for cwd_mode resolution (relative to skill workdir)
sandbox._comment_allow_path_escape: If false, any cwd that escapes playground_root is rejected

allowlist._comment_permanent_path: Repo-local allowlist file (exact key match: mode:session_id:command)
allowlist._comment_entries: Exact pre-approved keys loaded at startup
